title: Asia-Pacific markets close mixed as oil gains and Iran war keeps investors on edge
summary_full: International benchmark Brent crude gained 2.45% to $102.57 per barrel, while the U.S. West Texas Intermediate rose 2.51% to $95.85 per barrel as of 8:44 p.m. ET.
summary_public: International benchmark Brent crude gained 2.45% to $102.57 per barrel, while the U.S. West Texas Intermediate rose 2.51% to $95.85 per barrel as of 8:44 p.m. ET.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: oil gains and Iran war keeps investors on edge
